name: LiveSession
description: All-in-one product analytics platform with qualitative session replays, quantitative analytics dashboards, funnels, heatmaps and dev tools for error tracking.

seo.title: LiveSession — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: LiveSession: All-in-one product analytics platform with qualitative session replays, quantitative analytics dashboards, funnels, heatmaps and dev tools for erro

when_to_use: Session replay with dev-tools error overlay for debugging
Funnel analysis correlated with individual user sessions
Quantitative analytics and qualitative replay in one tool
Heatmaps combined with rage-click and error tracking

pros: Merges qualitative replay with quantitative dashboards
Developer tools capture console and network errors
Funnels and heatmaps share the same session data
cons: Quantitative analytics lag dedicated product analytics tools
Custom event instrumentation is still required for depth
Heatmap UX is less refined than Hotjar's
Pricing jumps sharply above starter volume
review.verdict: Good middle ground between Hotjar and Mixpanel, but teams serious about product analytics still need a real warehouse.
review.best_for: Product teams wanting replay plus lightweight dashboards in one GDPR-friendly tool.
review.not_for: Data teams that need SQL-grade product analytics or customer data infrastructure.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
